{{Quote|The visions. The visions! They thought to trick me by taking the form of my fellow Jedi, but my discipline is so strong - I tricked them back. One fell to the shyrack, and the others fell to my lightsaber|Nebelish's datapad found on his body|<ref name="KotOR II game" />}}
'''Nebelish''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. In [[3951 BBY]], he was found [[Death/Legends|dead]] in the [[Tomb of Ludo Kressh|Tomb]] of [[Ludo Kressh]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] by [[Meetra Surik]]. The body contained a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]] belonging to the late [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. He had gone mad and killed a few other Jedi with whom he was studying the tomb.

==Behind the scenes==
The polygon model of the corpse of Nebelish was actually the one used for [[Dustil Onasi]] in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. This was used because Dustil was to appear in the sequel, but the scenes were cut, therefore leaving only the model in the game engine.

The corpse of Nebelish is labeled '''Dead Jedi''', his name is only identified by his datapad.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} {{Corpse}}
